sections.name: Losko
sections.text: Smith Losko once lived in this chamber, splitting the southern half of the room into an office where he held meetings and the northern half into his personal chambers. Losko remains here to this day, but his life is long over—he now exists as little more than a skeleton draped with a heavy leather work apron, his spirit bound to his bones as long as his nemesis, Erissa, exists.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Medium
traits.text: *Space:* 5 feet, *Reach (Tall):* 5 feet, *Reach (Long):* 5 feet

traits.name: Skeleton
traits.text: This undead is made by animating a dead creature's skeleton with void energy.

traits.name: Undead
traits.text: Once living, these creatures were infused after death with void energy and soul-corrupting unholy magic. When reduced to 0 Hit Points, an undead creature is destroyed. Undead creatures are damaged by vitality energy and are healed by void energy, and don’t benefit from healing vitality effects.

traits.name: Unholy
traits.text: Effects with the unholy trait are tied to powerful magical forces of cruelty and sin. They often have stronger effects on holy creatures. Creatures with this trait are strongly devoted to unholy causes, and often have weakness to holy. If a creature with weakness to unholy uses an unholy item or effect, it takes damage from its weakness.

interaction_abilities.name: Site Bound
interaction_abilities.text: Losko is bound to the area he died and can't travel more than 30 feet from area B5.

universal_monster_ability.name: Void Healing
universal_monster_ability.text: A creature with void healing draws health from void energy rather than vitality energy. It is damaged by vitality damage and is not healed by healing vitality effects. It does not take void damage, and it is healed by void effects that heal undead.

automatic_abilities.name: Chilling Cry
automatic_abilities.effect: Losko releases horrific cry that chills the bones of those nearby. Creatures in a 20-foot emanation must succeed at a DC 22 Will save or become frightened 1 (frightened 2 on a critical failure).

traits.name: Auditory
traits.text: Auditory actions and effects rely on sound. An action with the auditory trait can be successfully performed only if the creature using the action can speak or otherwise produce the required sounds. A spell or effect with the auditory trait has its effect only if the target can hear it. This applies only to sound-based parts of the effect, as determined by the GM. This is different from a sonic effect, which still affects targets who can’t hear it (such as deaf targets) as long as the effect itself makes sound.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Emotion
traits.text: This effect alters a creature’s emotions. Effects with this trait always have the mental trait as well. Creatures with special training or that have mechanical or artificial intelligence are immune to emotion effects.

traits.name: Fear
traits.text: Fear effects evoke the emotion of fear. Effects with this trait always have the mental and emotion traits as well.

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target’s mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

automatic_abilities.name: Erissa's Badge
automatic_abilities.text: The sight of Erissa's badge distracts Losko. If a PC visibly wears this *essence charm*, Losko must succeed at a DC 20 Will save at the start of his turn. On a failure, he accuses the charm's wearer of being Erissa's stooge and threatens them with all manner of torment, spending enough time ranting that he becomes slowed 1 until he can no longer see the charm.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Shove
traits.text: You can use this weapon to Shove with the Athletics skill even if you don’t have a free hand. This uses the weapon’s reach (if different from your own) and adds the weapon’s item bonus to attack rolls as an item bonus to the Athletics check. If you critically fail a check to Shove using the weapon, you can drop the weapon to take the effects of a failure instead of a critical failure.

ability.name: Frustrated Rage

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Emotion
traits.text: This effect alters a creature’s emotions. Effects with this trait always have the mental trait as well. Creatures with special training or that have mechanical or artificial intelligence are immune to emotion effects.

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target’s mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

ability.requirement: Losko misses a Strike against a creature
ability.effect: Losko shrieks in Azlanti, accusing the foe of being one of Erissa's guards, here to do her dirty work. The creature he attempted to Strike feels Losko's frustration wash over them and must attempt a DC 22 Will save.
ability.success: The creature is off-guard until the end of Losko's turn.
ability.failure: The creature is off-guard until the end of Losko's next turn.
ability.critical_failure: The creature is off-guard until Losko is destroyed or until they spend 1 minute outside combat gathering their wits, whichever comes first.

ability.name: Gut-wrenching Terror

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

traits.name: Emotion
traits.text: This effect alters a creature’s emotions. Effects with this trait always have the mental trait as well. Creatures with special training or that have mechanical or artificial intelligence are immune to emotion effects.

traits.name: Fear
traits.text: Fear effects evoke the emotion of fear. Effects with this trait always have the mental and emotion traits as well.

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target’s mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

ability.text: Whenever Losko damages a frightened creature with a melee Strike, that creature's terror creates an upsetting sense of impending doom, causing the creature to become sickened 1.
